name: Crockpot Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 2 green bell peppers, seeded and cut into thin strips
6 large tomatoes, cut into 1/2 inch wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer half the vegetables in the crock pot in the following order: onion, eggplant, zucchini, garlic, green peppers, tomatoes.
2. Repeat layering with remaining vegetables.
3. Sprinkle basil, salt, pepper, and parsley over top of all layers.
4. Drizzle with olive oil.
5. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours.
6. Cool and chop coarsely before serving.
